title: The V-shaped recovery in stocks is a V-shaped recovery in earnings: Chart of the Week A large upswing in earnings revisions has been driving the stock market to new all-time highs.

Stock market today: S&P 500 clears 5th-straight record, Nasdaq hits fresh high as earnings, trade hopes bolster stocks US stocks held steady after President Trump visited the Federal Reserve and Wall Street digested the latest batch of corporate earnings.
Stocks to watch next week: Microsoft, Apple, Shell, AstraZeneca and HSBC Earnings preview of key companies reporting in the coming week and what to look out for.
What are share buybacks? A share repurchase, or share buyback, is when a company rebuys its own shares and returns money to its investors.
